title: chrysanthemum audibertii
intro: Chrysanthemum audibertii, also known as Golden Thread, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum audibertii include lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and reducing the risk of certain cancers. The herbal preparations of Chrysanthemum audibertii typically involve infusing the flowers in hot water to make a tea, or using the dried flowers in capsule form to promote overall well-being.
